abilities.name: effect-spore
abilities.description: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilities.name: poison-heal
abilities.description: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.

effectChanges.description: Poison still damages the Pokémon outside of battle.

abilities.name: technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

effectChanges.description: struggle is unaffected. helping hand and defense curl are not taken into account.
